summary: Freeform text summary of the problems with the inefficiencies or failure modes in the trace: The system repeatedly reran essentially the same IPCC search without converging (step repetition), failed to stop after establishing it could not verify an exact 85-page official IPCC document and eventually hit a reset limit (unaware of termination conditions / premature termination), and only weakly verified the target by finding an 81-page “Longer Report” plus a generic “Nuclear” mention rather than conclusively verifying the requested exact document and phrase/page requirements.
